title: gymnogramma japonica
intro: Gymnogramma japonica, also known as Japanese Gymnogramma, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma japonica include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to improve digestion and reduce swelling. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
